source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for dryland operations UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese map labels, form fields, compact status, station IDs, and dense data tables.
layout: Dryland map dashboards, 8px card radii, contour-line grids, compact route navigation, sand-wash panels, silver-sage controls, dusk-blue focus states, and low desert-map shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent sagebrush sprig motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a high desert sagebrush sprig, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: a single sagebrush sprig with multiple branching woody stems, narrow silver-sage leaves, dusty gray-green foliage, pale sand-tan dry stems, tiny dryland buds, accurate Artemisia tridentata character, crisp botanical form, natural texture, dry high-desert resilience.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the sprig; vertical-to-diagonal botanical specimen arrangement; no pot, no ground, no landscape.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves silvery leaf fuzz, sand-tan stems, and subtle dusk-blue cool shadows; no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no desert landscape, no flowers in bright colors, no second plant, no shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sagebrush light-mode design-system board, native large canvas
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive LIGHT MODE design-system board for a Morphous theme named exactly "Morphous Sagebrush", derived from the visible transparent high desert sagebrush sprig cutout. Make it a true source board, not a small screenshot.
Canvas and resolution: wide 16:9 board, target 3200 x 1800 pixels or larger, landscape only. Use a full design-system board layout with generous section spacing, crisp UI labels, and large readable headings. Avoid saving as a small 1672px-wide preview.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Sagebrush, Sagebrush Sprig, Light Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from silver-sage leaves, sand-tan woody stems, high-desert dust neutrals, faint dusk-blue cool shadows, dry seed buds, brittle branch structure, and maplike branching paths. The board must read as sagebrush in a high desert dryland map system.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; use short labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons with hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dryland map dashboard metric cards, route/contour chart, data table, filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow samples, texture samples, token chips, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn product design system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, sand-wash background, silver-sage primary actions, dusted sage secondary controls, dusk-blue focus rings, sand-tan map accents, charcoal-brown route lines, contour-map texture, sparse high-desert utility dashboard.
Color palette: silver sage, sand tan, dusk blue, high desert neutrals, dryland map accents, charcoal brown route ink; only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Constraints: no bright flower colors, no generic purple gradients, no saturated unrelated colors, no beige-only palette, no glossy glassmorphism, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Sagebrush", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sagebrush dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named exactly "Morphous Sagebrush" / "Sagebrush Sprig". It must feel like the visible Morphous Sagebrush light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new unrelated theme.
Canvas and resolution: wide 16:9 source board, target 3200 x 1800 pixels or larger, landscape only. Use a full design-system board layout with generous section spacing, crisp UI labels, and large readable headings. Avoid saving as a small 1672px-wide preview if possible.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Sagebrush, Sagebrush Sprig, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the visible light board structure, component coverage, typography guidance, token roles, dryland map dashboard density, and sagebrush visual language. Use the visible light board as the layout reference and convert it to dark mode. Preserve motif-derived palette roles: dusk-blue and charcoal-brown backgrounds, sand-wash text, silver-sage active controls, dusted sage surfaces, sand-tan chart accents, route-ink dividers, contour-map texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English product UI examples plus Japanese typography guidance; use short labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons with hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dryland map dashboard metric cards, route/contour chart, data table, filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow samples, texture samples, token chips, simple icons.
Visual details: deep dusk-blue and route-ink surfaces, sand-wash foreground, silver-sage controls, dusted sage secondary panels, sand-tan map accents, cool blue focus rings, contour-line overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls. Quiet utilitarian map/data UI, not a marketing page.
Color palette: silver sage, sand tan, dusk blue, high desert neutrals, dryland map accents, charcoal brown route ink; only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no saturated unrelated colors, no beige-only palette, no glossy glassmorphism, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Sagebrush", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
